description: Curated index of example scenarios and evidence-oriented areas.
source_of_truth_note: Example files are authoritative; this registry is a scenario map.

items.name: Sequential Prompt Run
items.purpose: Illustrate a normal prompt execution with manifest, audit, readiness report, no-handoff decision, and reset.
items.safe_use_notes: Use as an example of shape, not as live run evidence.

items.name: Org-Lane Delegation
items.purpose: Show a compact Orchestrator to Lead to Worker contract flow.
items.safe_use_notes: Example delegation does not imply autonomous sub-agent execution.

items.name: Memory Promotion
items.purpose: Demonstrate reviewed promotion from temporary observation into durable memory.
items.safe_use_notes: Promotion requires review; examples are not accepted memory.

items.name: Repair Bridge
items.purpose: Show a justified transient handoff for an incomplete or blocked prompt.
items.safe_use_notes: Create real handoffs only when the bridge decision justifies them.

items.name: Experiments
items.purpose: Plan, log, and close bounded workflow trials.
items.safe_use_notes: Experiment outcomes need review before becoming durable guidance.

items.name: Reports
items.purpose: House session, promptset audit, and routine evaluation report structures.
items.safe_use_notes: Reports summarize evidence; they do not override source files.

items.name: Findings
items.purpose: Capture reviewed findings and pattern observations.
items.safe_use_notes: Findings require evidence and should not be raw impressions.
